title: Senior Teacher - Delhi University - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Delhi University - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Delhi University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Ranchi-based team.

About Delhi University:
Delhi University is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Support students with special educational needs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Delhi University!
